component.name: sorane
component.description: OKF-native static site generator. C2PA signing is optional and delegated to external c2patool.

properties.name: sorane:cbom:scope
properties.value: Hash algorithms sorane dispatches in-process. Drift-gated by `npm run cbom-check`.

components.name: SHA-256
components.description: Node.js crypto.createHash('sha256') for font subset cache keys and search incremental hashes.
